plugins.name: feishu
plugins.description: Feishu (Lark) channel for Claude Code — receive and reply to Feishu messages

plugins.name: zchat
plugins.description: IRC channel for Claude Code — reply, join, dm, broadcast via slash commands

plugins.name: dev-loop-skills
plugins.description: AI-driven development pipeline — 7 skills for test-driven dev loop (bootstrap, plan, write, run, evaluate). v0.2: Skill 1 ships with self-update.sh for drift detection + 3-layer self-evolution (check / refresh / rebootstrap).

plugins.name: prd2impl
plugins.description: PRD-to-Implementation pipeline — 14 skills for planning, task generation, parallel batch dispatch, and milestone verification. Per-scope plans_dir isolation for parallel milestones. v0.4.1: plan-passthrough — superpowers:writing-plans-format md is first-class input (no YAML round-trip loss). 1 plan-file = 1 prd2impl task; /start-task delegates whole plan to superpowers:subagent-driven-development / executing-plans. skill-9 shows per-plan step progress; skill-10 cross-checks plan-declared files vs git diff (missing_create / declared_modify_not_modified → NO-GO).
